_comment: Service registry for the Control Panel. Update whenever a service changes.
_note_local_ports: This machine runs many Docker projects. Ports below are the local dev ports for comcoi-v2 specifically. Production ports are standard (80/443 via Caddy).

services.name: SvelteKit Frontend
services.description: SvelteKit SSR application serving the user interface
services._port_note: 5173-5177 occupied by other projects on this dev machine — using 5178

services.name: FastAPI Backend
services.description: Python FastAPI REST API with business logic and AI services
services._port_note: 8000/8001 occupied by vh-command-centre and others — using 8002

services.name: PostgreSQL + pgvector
services.description: PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector extension for relational data and CoCo RAG embeddings
services._port_note: 5432-5435/5439 occupied by local PG and other Docker DBs — using 5436

services.name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
services.description: Caddy handles reverse proxy, auto-TLS in production

infrastructure._note: Run provision-hetzner.sh once to create the VM. Then use deploy.sh for all subsequent deploys.

quick_start.run_migrations: docker compose exec backend alembic upgrade head
